serverInfo.name: Boombastic Events
serverInfo.description: Boombastic Events runs daytime and afternoon events across the Midlands under four sub-brands: THE 2PM CLUB (80s/90s/00s daytime disco), SILENT DISCO GREATEST HITS, FOOTLOOSE 80s, and FAMILY SILENT DISCO. Events run 2pm-6pm, cities include Northampton, Bedford, Milton Keynes, Coventry, Luton, and Leicester.

resources.name: events
resources.description: All upcoming Boombastic Events across all sub-brands and cities
